summary: Comprehensive testing of Sugar City Sweeps JIT Platform Registration features completed. All 52 backend tests passed (16 new JIT tests + 36 existing extension tests). Frontend tests verified: (1) Register page has no Display Name field, (2) Credentials shown INSIDE each game card with correct format, (3) Admin Extensions has JIT Alerts tab, (4) Deposit flow calls JIT registration before checkout.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: POST /api/auth/register creates game_password preset to 'Abc123'
✅ Backend: POST /api/ext/platform/register with valid game_id registers user (dry-run adapter)
✅ Backend: POST /api/checkout/create enforces JIT registration (passes with dry-run adapter)
✅ Backend: POST /api/ext/platform/alerts/{id}/resolve transitions alert to resolved
✅ Backend: All 36 existing extension tests pass (VIP, promo, referral, 2FA, password reset, support, analytics)
✅ Frontend: /register page has NO Display Name field (only email, password, confirm, terms, age)
✅ Frontend: Dashboard Games tab shows credentials INSIDE each game card with data-testid=game-credentials-{gameId}
✅ Frontend: Credentials display username (sugarnch954) matching pattern sugar[a-z]{2,3}[0-9]{3}
✅ Frontend: No credentials-banner at top of page
✅ Frontend: /admin/extensions page has JIT Alerts tab with data-testid=admin-ext-tab-alerts
✅ Frontend: JIT Alerts tab has open/resolved filter buttons
critical_code_review_comments: Admin user created before JIT feature doesn't have game_username/game_password - credentials only show for users with them set
seed_data_creation: Multiple test users created during testing with pattern testcreds_*, deposituser_*, newuser_*, pwuser_*
context_for_next_testing_agent: JIT platform registration is fully implemented and tested. The dry-run adapter accepts master credentials as platform UID. Stripe checkout will fail with placeholder key but JIT registration passes. Admin users created before the feature don't have game credentials - this is expected behavior.

mocked_apis.Stripe: Placeholder key - checkout creation may fail after JIT passes
mocked_apis.JIT Platform Adapter: Dry-run stub that accepts master username as platform UID
